title: Tariikhna Panel Schema v2 (Simplified)
description: One scene description in, one panel out. Character descriptions included for consistency when chaining panels.

scene_title.example: Abu Bakr Prepares for the Hijra

era.description: Historical era - informs clothing, architecture, and setting details.

characters.description: Every character visible in this panel. Each defined with fixed appearance details for consistency.

depiction_rule.description: Prophets MUST be NO_FACE, FROM_BEHIND, or SILHOUETTE. Sahaba and others can be FULL.

appearance.description: Complete physical description in one paragraph: age, skin tone, build, facial hair, clothing with colors, distinguishing features. Must be historically accurate.
appearance.example: Late 40s, light olive skin, slender build. Thin grey-streaked beard with slight henna tint. Wearing an off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth head wrap. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, slightly stooped shoulders.

moral_lesson.description: The Islamic moral or value this scene teaches.
moral_lesson.example: Preparation and trust in Allah go hand in hand.

narrative_text.description: Simple, age-appropriate story text (for children 6-12) to display alongside the panel image.
narrative_text.example: Abu Bakr had been waiting for this moment. He had already prepared two strong camels for the journey, feeding them carefully for months!

prophet_check.description: How is any prophet handled? Must never show face.

notes.example: Prophet shown from behind with green cloak. Abu Bakr face visible - permissible for Sahaba.

image_prompt.description: THE FINAL OUTPUT. A detailed 80-120 word visual description to send directly to the image generation model. Must include: art style, setting, character appearances (pulled from characters array), lighting, composition, and explicit 'no modern objects' note.
image_prompt.example: Children's watercolor illustration. A small walled mud-brick courtyard in 7th century Makkah, late afternoon. A slender older Arab man with light olive skin, thin grey-streaked beard with henna tint, wearing off-white thobe and brown woolen cloak, standing beside two healthy camels with simple rope halters. His hand rests gently on the nearest camel's neck. Warm golden-orange sunlight from the left casting long shadows. Wooden feeding trough and clay water basin near the wall. Wide shot, eye level. Warm sand and brown palette. No modern objects.
